name: Digital Personal Data Protection Act
description: India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 — establishes the framework for processing digital personal data. Enforced by the Data Protection Board of India once rules are notified.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud providers processing Indian residents' personal data must comply.
relationToAISecurity: AI training and inference on Indian personal data covered.
